4.2. AccuracyofKinematicPositioning
Observationdatafrom1:00to23:00(BDT)isusedinBDS-3singlesystemkinematic
positioning,and95%positioningerroriscountedfrom3:00to23:00eachday. Considering
thatPPP-B2bisaregionenhancementsystem,thepositioningperformanceofreceiversis
discussedaccordingtotheirregion: Northeast,Northwest,andSouthofChina. Inaddition,
different types of receivers are deployed in some locations to compare the positioning
improvementofdifferenttypesofreceivers. ThestatisticalresultsareshowninTable4.
